message:
fix(tui): fix history footer/detail tests that leaked cwd git state

Two history-mode tests expected no commit URL to be available, but the
test helper left repo_root unset, causing history_selected_commit_url()
to fall back to cwd—which is inside the real project git repo. Fixed by
pointing repo_root at a non-git tempdir. Also corrected the detail test
to assert on detail-pane content rather than footer hints.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
